channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp post light in Glynde Road cul-de-sac, 16th June
item.description:
Light not working for past fortnight.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glynde Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping persist, 16th June
item.description:
Despite previous report been closed as “resolved”, I’m here again and there’s more rubbish. I don’t think sending someone to pick it up is the solution. Also when reports are closed it would be helpful to know what’s been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flag attached to lamppost, 16th June
item.description:
The person who put it up (resident of 22 Ashfield Road) is refusing to take it down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashfield Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped e scoter, 16th June
item.description:
Dumped e scoter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Round Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over footpath, 16th June
item.description:
There is litter scattered all over the footpath directly next to the B11 bus stop located on the side where the parade of shops are near the Bexleyheath bus station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag dumped, 16th June
item.description:
Opposite 9 The Orchard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, The Orchard, White Oak, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large swing still missing, 16th June
item.description:
Large swing still not fixed sivce February. Has been removed but not replaced (have used old photos)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytippin furniture by recycling bins, 16th June
item.description:
A tall fridge has been fly tipped and left by the recycling bins by someone around who lives in the flats (unknown). Requires to be removed. Located in York row estate between the passage way of Hows street and Whiston Road - E2 8EE
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hows Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Range Rover with multiple PCN’s issued, 16th June
item.description:
There is a black velar SUV which appears to have been here for some time now. It has multiple PCN’s and seems as if it has been stolen and abandoned. Requires further investigation. Locates on Ormsby street adjacent to the Adventure playground. E2 8JQ
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pearson Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 68 Lordship Lane-Litter Bin overflowing with waste, 16th June
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied as its overflowing with waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-70, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 18 Chesterfield Grove- Flytipping, 16th June
item.description:
Flytipped item blocking pathway. Needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on pavement, 16th June
item.description:
Multiple items of waste dumped on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandling Rise, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 189 Gordon Road - Numerous items of dumped household belongings, 16th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been here a couple of weeks and is actually worse than the picture shows as people have added to it. The recycling team cannot access the bins, nor can residents effectively recycle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 187, Gordon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
Rubbish bags left near bin at Fingal Street/Woolwich Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can pavement be inspected here?, 16th June
item.description:
Missing a concrete edge to the tree pit/flower bed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges need cutting., 16th June
item.description:
Grass verges need cutting havn't been done for a while
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Luggage left on New River bank, 16th June
item.description:
It’s been here for two months. They’ve even cut the grass without taking it away.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New River Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, Victoria Way, 15th June
